playlist_description: The ultimate progression playlist for runners and endurance athletes. Professionally curated to take you from a steady warm-up jog to absolute peak sprinting performance, ending with a soothing cooldown.
playlist_strategy: Progressive BPM and energy build, transitioning from warm-up house to high-BPM drum & bass for peak sprinting, followed by a dedicated ambient cooldown phase.
